mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% indicates tightening labor markets, which drives corporate profit growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in the federal funds rate and declining CPI inflation signal a Fed tightening cycle with disinflation, creating headwinds for equity valuations and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where both FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL < 210.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in housing starts above 1,400 thousand units signals strong consumer demand, driving corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 1400.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production above 115 indicates expanding manufacturing activity, which boosts corporate earnings and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 115.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly decline in GDP growth below 2% signals economic weakness, which triggers risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in 60%+ of instances where GDPC1 falls below 2%.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in industrial production and decline in unemployment signals strong labor and goods market conditions, creating positive momentum in S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where both INDPRO rises and UNRATE falls.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in consumer spending (RSAFS) above $375 billion combined with rising housing starts (HOUST) above 1,400 units signals robust demand conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where both RSAFS exceeds 375000 and HOUST exceeds 1400.
